meta_title: For Students: marketing automation to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Marketing Automation to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to use marketing automation to solve complex debugging hurdles. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your dev workflow.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because debugging manual logic is a bottleneck. By automating your marketing funnel's technical layer, you decouple infrastructure from logic. Use Antigravity to scaffold robust API integrations and Claude Code to perform iterative, AI-driven root cause analysis, effectively turning your debugging process into a scalable, automated feedback loop.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the silence of your workspace heavy with the frustration of a project that refuses to compile. You’ve spent hours hunting a phantom race condition in your marketing automation workflow, and the deadline is looming. The code isn't just broken; it's opaque, and your current debugging process is hitting a wall.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started orchestrating it? By leveraging AI-native tools, you can transform your debugging from a manual slog into a high-leverage engineering process. This guide pivots your workflow, showing you how to build resilience into your marketing automation apps using the next generation of AI development assistants.

steps.title: Define the Automation Logic
steps.description: Establish the core flow of your marketing automation engine before writing the complex handler logic to prevent logic-based bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level state machine schema for a marketing email drip campaign, including error states for failed API calls.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.json --goal 'Generate the skeleton for this state machine'

steps.title: Instrument Observability
steps.description: Inject structured logging into your marketing triggers to ensure you have data points when things inevitably fail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my existing event listener to include structured JSON logs for every user interaction in the marketing funnel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude review --path ./src/events --task 'Add structured logging to all functions'

steps.title: Automate Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse your logs and identify the specific failure points in your automation pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this error trace from my marketing automation service and suggest a fix that handles transient network timeouts.

steps.title: Implement Self-Healing Logic
steps.description: Write automated retry mechanisms that detect failures and attempt recovery without human intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust exponential backoff retry decorator for my API client to handle rate limits in the marketing platform.

steps.title: Validate via Synthetic Testing
steps.description: Create automated tests that simulate heavy traffic to ensure your marketing automation doesn't break under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a synthetic test suite that mocks 100 concurrent marketing webhook requests to verify system stability.

pro_tips: Always wrap external API calls in a 'Circuit Breaker' pattern to prevent cascading failures in your automation stack.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests *before* you write the actual code; it forces you to clarify your requirements.
Don't just log errors; log the state of the context object to make debugging 10x faster.
Treat your marketing automation as a distributed system, even if it's small, to build better architectural habits.
Leverage the 'dry-run' flag in your automation scripts to test logic without triggering actual customer emails.
content.next_steps: Now that you have an automated debugging pipeline, integrate a monitoring tool like Sentry to catch runtime exceptions before they become user-facing bugs.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop debugging blindly and start building with intent. Every line of code you write is a step closer to becoming a senior-level engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
